prompt: Create a realistic editorial sports portrait of a beautiful young Pakistani woman tennis player standing confidently on a professional outdoor tennis court in bright natural daylight. She has long dark flowing hair, a white athletic headband, small stud earrings, and subtle luxury jewelry including a delicate bracelet. Her face should be softly anonymized/obscured with a smooth neutral blur rectangle while keeping the rest of the image highly detailed. She wears a fitted black sleeveless athletic crop top, a premium white pleated tennis skirt, and white tennis sneakers. Pose her full-body in a relaxed athletic stance with one leg bent and crossed slightly in front, holding a black tennis racket diagonally across her body with both hands, the racket head visible on the right side. Use a shallow depth of field with a softly blurred green court fence and blue-green court surface in the background, natural shadows, crisp fabric texture, realistic skin tones, and a clean high-end lifestyle photography look. Vertical portrait composition, centered subject, no text, no watermark.
